'''Tarla Limpan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] who served in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic]], and later the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|Defense Forces]]. During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], she led the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]] as an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]], though she was killed when her [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the ''[[Blue Diver]]'', was destroyed by [[Centerpoint Station]].

==Biography==
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], she was a [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] in the New Republic. As of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], Limpan was an admiral in the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]], though she had become somewhat relaxed after years of peacetime. She served as captain of the [[Dodonna (Galactic-class)|''Dodonna'']], as well as commander of the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Second Fleet]] task force within the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] following the removal of [[Matric Klauskin]], who was deemed to be insane. She led the Galactic Alliance forces during the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]] with the supposed aid of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].

Months later, during the blockade of the Corellian System, Limpan was forced to retreat when forces from [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] and [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]] forces launched a surprise assault to break the [[Blockade of Corellia]]. At this point Limpan transferred her flag from ''Dodonna'' to the ''[[Blue Diver]]''. Limpan ordered her forces to attempt to disable [[Centerpoint Station]] before leaping out of the system, to regroup at [[Point Bleak]].

Limpan led the Second Fleet once again during a meeting between the Corellian forces and co-Chief of State [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] in an isolated star system, three months later. The Duros Admiral was ordered to support Solo in case the meeting was a trap; when the Confederation forces engaged Solo with antiquated vessels, Limpan entered the battle, leading the Second Fleet aboard the ''Blue Diver''. However, the trap was not one which would be fought conventionally; from the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]], the Corellian leadership fired [[Centerpoint Station]], unleashing a torrent of gravitic energy which wiped out the Second Fleet. Admiral Limpan perished along with the vast majority of her command.
